mapper.select:
SELECT /* UserCanMgmtMapper.selectUserCanMgmtList */ A.USERID, A.NAME, A.MOBILE_NO, A.FIRST_LOGIN_DT, A.LAST_LOGIN_DT, A.EMAIL, A.ZIPCD, A.ADDRESS, A.ADDRESS_DTL, DECODE(A.RESULT_YN, 'Y', '전송', '미전송') AS RESULT_YN, A.REGST_ID, TO_CHAR(A.REGST_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM') AS REGST_DTTM, NVL((SELECT USR_NM FROM CMN_USR_MST WHERE USR_ID = A.RVISN_ID), 'SYSTEM') AS RVISN_NM, TO_CHAR(A.RVISN_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS RVISN_DTTM, (SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0236' AND CD_VAL = A.SEND_RSN_CD) AS SEND_RSN, DECODE(A.SEND_YN, 'Y', '처리', '미처리') AS SEND_YN FROM CMN_WEBUSER_CAN_MST A WHERE 1=1
AND UPPER(A.USERID) = UPPER(#{userid})
AND A.NAME like #{name} || '%'
AND A.SEND_YN = #{sendYn}
AND A.SEND_RSN_CD = #{sendRsn} || ' '
AND TO_CHAR(A.REGST_DTTM, 'YYYYMM') = TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{searchStartDt, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'YYYYMM' ), 'YYYYMM')
ORDER BY A.LAST_LOGIN_DT

SELECT /* UserCanMgmtMapper.selectUserCanMgmtListEx */ NVL(A.USERID, ' ') AS USERID, NVL(A.NAME, ' ') AS NAME, NVL(A.MOBILE_NO, ' ') AS MOBILE_NO, NVL(TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.FIRST_LOGIN_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD'), ' ') AS FIRST_LOGIN_DT, NVL(TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.LAST_LOGIN_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD'), ' ') AS LAST_LOGIN_DT, NVL(A.EMAIL, ' ') AS EMAIL, NVL(A.ZIPCD, ' ') AS ZIPCD, NVL(A.ADDRESS, ' ') AS ADDRESS, NVL(A.ADDRESS_DTL, ' ') AS ADDRESS_DTL, NVL(DECODE(A.RESULT_YN, 'Y', '전송', '미전송'), ' ') AS RESULT_YN, NVL(A.REGST_ID, ' ') AS REGST_ID, NVL(TO_CHAR(A.REGST_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM'), ' ') AS REGST_DTTM, NVL((SELECT USR_NM FROM CMN_USR_MST WHERE USR_ID = A.RVISN_ID), 'SYSTEM') AS RVISN_NM, NVL(TO_CHAR(A.RVISN_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), ' ') AS RVISN_DTTM, NVL((SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0236' AND CD_VAL = A.SEND_RSN_CD), ' ') AS SEND_RSN, NVL(DECODE(A.SEND_YN, 'Y', '처리', '미처리'), ' ') AS SEND_YN FROM CMN_WEBUSER_CAN_MST A WHERE 1=1
AND UPPER(A.USERID) = UPPER(#{userid})
AND A.NAME like #{name} || '%'
AND A.SEND_YN = #{sendYn}
AND A.SEND_RSN_CD = #{sendRsn} || ' '
AND TO_CHAR(A.REGST_DTTM, 'YYYYMM') = TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{searchStartDt, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'YYYYMM' ), 'YYYYMM')
ORDER BY A.LAST_LOGIN_DT
mapper.update: UPDATE /* UserCanMgmtMapper.updateResultYN */ CMN_WEBUSER_CAN_MST SET RESULT_YN = #{resultYn}, RVISN_ID = #{rvisnId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RVISN_DTTM = SYSDATE WHERE userid = #{userid}
mapper.delete: /* UserCanMgmtMapper.userInfoInsService */ INSERT INTO MCP_USER@DL_CAN (USERID, PASSWORD, NAME, AUTH_CODE, PIN, EMAIL, POST, ADDRESS, ADDRESS_DTL, MOBILE_NO, CONTACT_NO, BIRTHDAY, GENDER, SYS_RDATE, SYS_UDATE, SYS_LDATE, LOGIN_COUNT, STATUS, CUST_NUM, AUTH_KEY, USER_DIVISION, EMAIL_CODE, ADDRESS_BJD, REVOCATION_DATE) SELECT USERID, PASSWORD, NAME, AUTH_CODE, PIN, EMAIL, POST, ADDRESS, ADDRESS_DTL, MOBILE_NO, CONTACT_NO, BIRTHDAY, GENDER, SYS_RDATE, SYS_UDATE, SYS_LDATE, LOGIN_COUNT, STATUS, CUST_NUM, AUTH_KEY, USER_DIVISION, EMAIL_CODE, ADDRESS_BJD, REVOCATION_DATE FROM MCP_USER@DL_MCP A WHERE A.STATUS = '1' AND A.AUTH_CODE = 'USER_ROLE' AND A.USER_DIVISION = '00' AND TO_DATE(A.SYS_LDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') < TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -12),'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD')

DELETE /* UserCanMgmtMapper.userInfoDelService */ FROM MCP_USER@DL_MCP A WHERE A.STATUS = '1' AND A.AUTH_CODE = 'USER_ROLE' AND A.USER_DIVISION = '00' AND TO_DATE(A.SYS_LDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') < TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -12),'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD')

UPDATE /* UserCanMgmtMapper.userInfoUpdService */ CMN_WEBUSER_CAN_MST SET NAME = '삭제' , MOBILE_NO = '' , FIRST_LOGIN_DT = '' , LAST_LOGIN_DT = '' , EMAIL = '' , ZIPCD = '' , ADDRESS = '' , ADDRESS_DTL = '' , RVISN_ID = 'SYSTEM' , RVISN_DTTM = SYSDATE WHERE USERID IN ( SELECT USERID FROM MCP_USER@DL_MCP A WHERE A.STATUS = '1' AND A.AUTH_CODE = 'USER_ROLE' AND A.USER_DIVISION = '00' AND TO_DATE(A.SYS_LDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') < TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -12),'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD'))
